title: Also time visible in calendar
excerpt: We are using Monday for the workflow of a theatre. To make even better use of Monday it would be very handy if not only the date but also the start and end time of the workflow would be visible in the calendar. Now it sh…

posts.author: Tamara (Tamara Kuipers)
posts.cookedHtml: We are using Monday for the workflow of a theatre. To make even better use of Monday it would be very handy if not only the date but also the start and end time of the workflow would be visible in the calendar. Now it shows as an all day event. Is that possible?

posts.author: TRB-monday.com (Talia)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @Tamara, thanks so much for posting!

Have you already tried adding a start time to your date column like this?:

image340×526 20.4 KB

We are looking to add the functionality to set an end time later in 2020. Let me know what you think!

posts.author: Tamara (Tamara Kuipers)
posts.cookedHtml: Thanks for your answer. This helps a bit, so I will be waiting for the set an end time later this year.
